name: Zucchini Oatmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease 12 muffin cups.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F.
3. In a large bowl, measure the flour, sugar, chopped pecans, quick-cooking oatmeal (uncooked), baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
4. In a medium bowl, beat the eggs; stir in the zucchini and oil.
5. Stir the egg mixture into the dry ingredients until just combined.
6. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin cups.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
